issues.title: Fails to find (missing) file in GitHub raw user content, build of existing, unchanged repo won't run with tests
issues.body:
**Bug description**
[ERROR] Errors: 
[ERROR]   ResourceCacheServiceTests.cacheHttpResources:104 » IllegalState Failed to cache the resource: URL [https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/main/spring-ai-core/src/main/resources/embedding/embedding-model-dimensions.properties]
[INFO] 
[ERROR] Tests run: 9, Failures: 0, Errors: 1, Skipped: 0
[INFO] 
[INFO] ------------------------------------------------------------------------
[INFO] Reactor Summary for Spring AI 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT:
[INFO] 
[INFO] Spring AI .......................................... SUCCESS [  1.719 s]
[INFO] Spring AI BOM ...................................... SUCCESS [  0.072 s]
[INFO] Spring AI Core ..................................... SUCCESS [ 25.264 s]
[INFO] Spring AI Transformers Embedding Client ............ FAILURE [ 13.329 s]

**Environment**
Current version of Spring AI on main branch.

openjdk version "17.0.15" 2025-04-15 LTS
OpenJDK Runtime Environment (build 17.0.15+10-LTS)
OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM (build 17.0.15+10-LTS, mixed mode, sharing)
(Loaded with sdkman on MacOS, sdk u java 17.0.15-librca)

**Steps to reproduce**
./mvnw clean package, per the repo README. Nothing beyond that required to produce this or other errors (before trying the Liberica JDK above, I tried other providers+versions of JDK, including Microsoft 17 & 21, Oracle 17.0.12, and more. Those produce Mockito errors in tests, this one doesn't, producing instead the error logged in this issue.

**Expected behavior**
Successful build, tests complete without error.

**Minimal Complete Reproducible example**
Did a `git fetch upstream` to update my local cloned repo from several weeks ago, then tried to build.

comments.body:
> Current version of Spring AI on main branch.

Are you sure you're in the current version?

in the current version , `spring-ai-core` is not exist since [this commit](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/commit/e3f9b7c16b76f5575567d90904fee1fc4ca74992)

It’s probably because of the following:
> Did a git fetch upstream to update my local cloned repo from several weeks ago, then tried to build.
Great catch! I did a fetch and then confirmed but that's clearly it. I'll review and confirm that all is well in the morning. More news soon.

If you can’t update to the latest version, you can temporarily pass the test by modifying the value of `originalResourceUri1` variable in `ResourceCacheServiceTests.java` as follows:

```
var originalResourceUri1 = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/main/spring-ai-model/src/main/resources/embedding/embedding-model-dimensions.properties";
```

Hi @dev-jonghoonpark, after failing to get everything to resolve properly, I tried just cloning into a new directory and building there. That resolved this issue but resulted in another. 😅 I'm going to close this one and open a new one that properly reflects the current state of things. Thank you for your help!
